description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 25 hrs 13 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 2 hrs 50 mins. His tracked work was split across 5 projects, and his activity was mostly in Java, with additional time in Markdown and other languages. There were no GitHub commits, pull requests, or new repositories recorded this week.
